notes: All 9 responses are highly consistent and accurate on the 6 components, colors, shapes, and the HTTPS/gRPC protocol labels. None detected the dangling/phantom third gRPC line from the API Gateway — the diagram's notable design quirk — so this is a systematic blind spot rather than a per-response failure. rep2 variants (t0.1 and t0.7) were marginally better by explicitly noting the gRPC label spans both the Auth Service and Worker Queue branches, whereas most others misreported the Worker Queue connection as unlabeled. No hallucinations in any response; all scores held to 8 due to the shared phantom-line omission and minor label-attribution imprecision.
